title: thymus longiflorus subsp. membranaceus
intro: Thymus longiflorus subsp. membranaceus, also known as creeping thyme or creeping wild thyme, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and reduce stress. The health benefits of Thymus longiflorus subsp. membranaceus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
